items.title: Signs point to Steve Kerr leaving Golden State Warriors
items.blurb: Signs point to Steve Kerr leaving Golden State Warriors — Golden State Warriors coach Steve Kerr says he won't decide on his coaching future for "a week or two." Since the Warriors' season ended in a play-in loss to the Phoenix Suns on Friday, all the signs point to Kerr leaving the team he's coached for the last dozen seasons.

items.title: James Harden Notched Historic Career Feat On Monday
items.blurb: James Harden Notched Historic Career Feat On Monday —   Los Angeles Clippers guard James Harden entered Monday’s matchup against the Philadelphia 76ers needing just one point to reach a significant career milestone. The Clippers fell to Philadelphia in a closely contested game at the Wells Fargo Center on Tuesday, but Harden delivered 28 points along with six rebounds and five assists.

items.title: Taylor Jenkins Meets With Bucks To Discuss Head Coaching Vacancy
items.blurb: Taylor Jenkins Meets With Bucks To Discuss Head Coaching Vacancy — Taylor Jenkins met in Memphis last week with Jon Horst, Wes Edens and Jimmy Haslam to discuss the franchise's head coaching vacancy. The two sides are expected to meet again soon to further discuss the opening. Jenkins was head coach of the Memphis Grizzlies from 2019 until he was abruptly fired near the end of the 2024-25 season.

items.blurb: Devin Booker Signs Two-Year, $145 Million Max Contract with Suns — On July 10, 2025, Devin Booker made NBA history by signing a two-year, $145 million max extension with the Phoenix Suns.
